chapters.title: Falling Leaves
chapters.content: Emma arrived in Seoul during autumn. The streets were covered with golden leaves, and the cool air made every walk feel peaceful.

chapters.title: The Bookstore
chapters.content: In a small bookstore near the river, she met Jun, who recommended a novel and offered to show her the best hidden cafés in the city.

chapters.title: A Slow Beginning
chapters.content: They spent the afternoon talking about books, travel, and music. Sometimes, the most important stories begin very quietly.
